tagline: Find peace amidst the digital storm.
liner: Ceasefire in the Static (Data Storm Version) invites you into a slow, atmospheric journey where dark gothic orchestration meets late-90s street drums. At an intimate 82 BPM, emotional female rock-opera singing pairs with vulnerable male R&B leads to explore the psychological weight of information overload. Listen as deep piano and ominous violins rise against digital glitch textures and urgent notification pings. The track captures a frustrated resignation that eventually seeks a holy line through broken code. It is a haunting meditation on identity crisis, searching for a quiet room behind the panic where one can finally hear their real voice again.
worldCaption: A gothic R&B soundscape blending orchestral strings with digital glitches and notification pings to visualize data anxiety.

bios.lead: Sings emotional rock opera lines over deep piano.
bios.back: Harmonizes softly behind the main vocals throughout.
bios.drums: Pounds slow, dark rhythms that anchor the chaos.
bios.perc: Adds street beats and urgent digital glitch textures.
bios.bass: Drives a sub-bass line through every section.
bios.synth: Weaves atmospheric pads beneath the orchestral strings.
bios.other: Layers notification sounds to simulate data overload.
bios.guitar: Plays melancholic, dark melodic lines in verses.
bios.keys: Provides deep piano foundations for emotional singing.
bios.strings: Rises slowly with ominous violins and cellos.
